details: tw-style-utils@0.7.0 was scanned and produced no findings indicative of supply-chain attack behavior. No install-time lifecycle scripts performing remote fetches or code execution, no credential or environment exfiltration patterns, no hardcoded attacker-controlled network destinations, no obfuscated payloads, and no suspicious dependency-tree manipulation were observed in the scanned files.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
